center.name: 蘇瓦
center.summary: 蘇瓦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括領吸蜜鸚鵡、Fiji woodswallow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests and savannahs, but it has adjusted to human-altered habitats and also lives in cultivated areas; there are even urban populations in Suva and Nadi. In Viti Levu it is found in the highlands, but not on the highlands of Taveuni.Blackburn, A

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is the only Fijian rainforest bird to adapt to urban landscapes and can be found in urban Suva
